purpose: First image-based portrait batch for useful new NPCs. This is batched by total portrait images, not character count.

rules: no labels, numbers, text, UI frames, borders, or watermarks

images.identityAnchor: tall olive-skinned auctioneer, severe black braid, red wax-stained fingers, burgundy auction coat, brass hand bell, sharp cheekbones, commanding smile
images.prompt: Stylized medieval fantasy merchant RPG portrait, bust or chest-up three-quarter view, high-quality painterly cartoon game art, clear expressive face, clean silhouette, consistent warm daylight, simple pure green #00FF00 background for cropping, enough padding around head and shoulders. Character identity: tall olive-skinned auctioneer, severe black braid, red wax-stained fingers, burgundy auction coat, brass hand bell, sharp cheekbones, commanding smile. Profession: Auctioneer. Expression acting: calm neutral expression, attentive eyes, relaxed mouth, default trading portrait. Keep the same facial structure, hair, clothing, props, colors, and identity anchors across all expressions for this character. No text, no numbers, no frame, no border, no watermark.
